text:
Created attachment 181543
www/node6: Update to v6.10.2

Update to the latest upstream v6 LTS release.

portlint: OK (-C, spurious warnings about /etc/make.conf and python use)
testport: OK (poudriere, 11.0-R, 10.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
testportL OK (poudriere, 11.0-R, 10.3-R, amd64/i386, BUNDLED_SSL)
